meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Ship SaaS Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to eliminate technical roadblocks and ship your product faster. Beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle ends when you stop debugging manually and start leveraging AI agents as senior pair programmers. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for real-time execution, you transform technical bottlenecks into resolved tickets, maintaining your velocity and ensuring your MVP reaches the market on schedule.
content.intro:
Your codebase is a graveyard of half-finished features. You start with high-octane energy, but the moment a cryptic stack trace appears or a dependency conflict arises, the momentum dies. It's not a lack of vision; it's the friction of the 'missing middle'—the gap between a great idea and a shippable binary.

This isn't about learning more syntax; it's about changing your deployment cadence. By leveraging AI-native debugging agents, you shift from being a frustrated builder to a high-leverage architect. We are going to strip away the noise and use specialized tools to force your project across the finish line.

steps.title: Establish Architectural Context
steps.description: Before debugging, you must define the scope to prevent AI hallucination. Use Antigravity to map your project dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the primary bottleneck preventing the MVP from being production-ready.

steps.title: Isolate the Breaking Change
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a targeted git diff analysis to identify exactly which commit broke your build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the last stable state with the current broken state and summarize the architectural drift.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into the AI to bypass hours of manual stack trace debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the provided logs and generate a fix that adheres to the established project coding standards.

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Clean up the technical debt accumulated during the rapid prototyping phase to ensure stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the module identified in step 3 to be more modular and easier to test.

steps.title: Validate with Synthetic Tests
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break other parts of your SaaS by running AI-generated unit tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests for the current feature to guarantee deployment readiness.

pro_tips: Treat your AI agent like a junior dev: provide a clear definition of 'Done' before every prompt.
Never paste entire files; use targeted snippets to keep the context window focused and accurate.
Use Antigravity to keep a 'Project Journal' to prevent repeating the same debugging loops.
Always commit your code before triggering an AI refactor to maintain a clear rollback path.
Focus on shipping the MVP feature first; use AI to comment out non-essential 'nice-to-have' blocks.
content.next_steps: Once the build is stable, focus on setting up a CI/CD pipeline to automate your deployment process so you never have to manually debug a live environment again.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop stalling and start shipping. The market doesn't care about your code quality; it cares about your product's value. Stop debugging in the dark and start building at scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
